transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, First National, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My card keeps getting refused. I've tried it at two places today and it's not working.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right, let me see... the card shows as active. No obvious reason it should be declining.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Could it be my daily spending limit?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your daily limit is five hundred. What did you try to spend total?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: About four hundred across the two purchases.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That shouldn't be the problem then. Hard to say really — could be the merchant's terminal, though two different merchants does seem unlikely.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me try a system refresh on the card record. Done. That might help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just a record refresh. Should be immediate if it worked. Try it again and see.

planted_violations: unable to diagnose decline reason; applied vague 'system refresh' without explanation
no reference or follow-up mechanism provided if issue persists
